events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess scenario: residential job, fall protection, observed field condition frayed/burned webbing, work rough-complete. Need estimate measurable condition and state why out of tolerance. References OSHA 1926 Subpart M, 1910.140. Fall protection equipment (harness/lanyard/webbing) with frayed/burned webbing is defective, must be removed from service immediately. Decision fail. Risk high or critical? Burned/frayed webbing can lead to fall death; critical maybe. But component condition categories: installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, degraded, failed. Work stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 100 roughed in? Could be 90. Value? Numeric reading not asked; maybe 0 or could estimate defect severity. Since task says estimate or interpret measurable condition and state why out of tolerance. Value could be 0 (within tolerance? no). Maybe value represent number of defects observed? Not specified. Use 0. Sound_source etc default empty string and 0. Order empty list. Workable empty list. Findings: frayed/burned webbing on fall protection component compromises strength; no visible tolerance for damaged webbing; equipment must be removed from service per OSHA. Actions: immediate removal from service, tag/lock out, replace with compliant inspected equipment, retrain worker. Rationale. References: OSHA 1926 Subpart M (personal fall arrest systems), 1910.140 (personal fall protection systems). Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside JSON.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision":false,"risk":"critical","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant","worn","degraded","failed"],"percent_complete":90,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.95,"event_time":0.0,"rate":0.0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Fall protection webbing is frayed and burned, indicating loss of material strength and integrity.","Damaged webbing exceeds the zero-tolerance condition for personal fall arrest system components.","Equipment is installed but defective and unsafe for use."],"actions":["Immediately remove the damaged fall protection equipment from service.","Tag and isolate the defective component so it cannot be used.","Replace it with a compliant, inspected, and manufacturer-approved fall protection assembly.","Inspect all other fall protection gear on site before next use.","Review fall protection inspection requirements with the crew."],"rationale":"Frayed and burned webbing on a fall protection component is not repairable in the field and falls outside any acceptable wear tolerance. OSHA requires personal fall arrest system components to be inspected before each use and removed from service when damaged or defective. Burned fibers have lost tensile strength, so the component cannot be relied upon to arrest a fall.","references":["OSHA 1926 Subpart M - Fall Protection","OSHA 1910.140 - Personal Fall Protection Systems"]}
